author: potuz
content: Should I update the EIP 7732? it seems that we are getting to a final version without any more changes?

author: jtraglia
content: It certainly does feel like we're close.

author: potuz
content:
https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/issues/5333
cc <@520034910149410861>, don't think this is too serious, but it's doable though: builder creates a split 49-51 for the valid payload but votes differently on attestations and PTC, thus leading the PTC to vote for timely and attesters to vote for the payload even though it was late, with only 2% of the stake.
